query:
UPDATE issues SET
            status   = COALESCE($1, status),
            assignee = CASE WHEN $2::text = '__clear__' THEN NULL
                            WHEN $2::text IS NULL THEN assignee
                            ELSE $2 END,
            priority = COALESCE($3, priority)
        WHERE id = $4
        RETURNING id, status, assignee, priority
